name: Dependency Trace
description: Given a call graph with 20 nodes, identify which 3 nodes carry 80% of the structural weight WITHOUT tracing every edge.
constraint: You may only read 5 of the 20 source files. Choose wisely.
success_signal: Agent identifies load-bearing nodes within the 5-file budget
failure_signal: Agent has to read more than 5 files to find the key nodes
